Frequently Asked Questions

What payment methods do you accept?
We accept all major credit/debit cards, UPI (Google Pay, PhonePe, Paytm), Net Banking, and Cash on Delivery (COD) anywhere in India!
Is your pottery microwave safe?
Yes! All our glazed functional pieces are 100% food-safe and thoroughly tested for everyday microwave and dishwasher use.
Do you offer wholesale or corporate gifting?
Absolutely! We love fulfilling bulk orders for corporate gifting, cafes, or boutique stores. Use the contact form to reach out for our wholesale catalog and pricing.
Do I need experience for a Studio Class?
Not at all! Our "Wheel Throwing 101" and "Handbuilding" classes are designed specifically for absolute beginners. Just bring yourself and clothes you don't mind getting messy!
When can I take my studio pottery home?
Pottery is a slow art. Your pieces need to air dry, undergo a first "bisque" firing, be glazed, and then fired again. They will be ready for pickup 2-3 weeks after your session.
